abstract:

Abstract
Asartificialintelligence(AI)becomesdeeplyintegratedintocriticalinfrastruc-
turesandeverydaylife,ensuringitssafedeploymentisoneofhumanity’smost
urgent challenges. Current AI models prioritize task optimization over safety,
leading to risks of unintended harm. These risks are difficult to address due to
